title: chassalia corallifera
intro: Chassalia corallifera is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coral bush or coral hedge. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts and leaves of Chassalia corallifera contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Chassalia corallifera are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to alleviate various health issues.
